hyperedges.label: App Bootstrap Chain (HTML -> entry -> App -> Dashboard)

nodes.label: URL-Driven Screen State Initialization (mp_screen)
nodes.rationale: Magic Patterns canvas tooling deep-links into a specific screen state: the mp_screen query parameter selects a screen entry in canvas.manifest.js and its saved state (e.g. activeTab) seeds the UI, letting one route render multiple designed screens (Content Market Share vs Viewer Sentiment) without separate routes.

nodes.label: Date-Range Scaling Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Mock data stores only 30-day base figures; scaleCount multiplies by a per-range factor (1 / 2.9 / 5.6) so every UI surface stays consistent across 30/90/180-day views without duplicating datasets.

nodes.label: Share of Voice Metric
nodes.rationale: Core competitive metric: Sonalika's proportion of category video volume (and views/comments). Chosen as the headline KPI because the dashboard's purpose is competitive YouTube intelligence for the Indian tractor category.

nodes.label: Share of Engagement Metric
nodes.rationale: Engagement is defined as views + likes + comments and centralized in engagementOf so KPI cards and the competitor table compute engagement share identically.

nodes.label: Own-Brand (Sonalika) Highlighting Pattern
nodes.rationale: SONALIKA_ID is the single source of truth for which brand is 'own'; components compare brandId against it to pin Sonalika in filters, emphasize its bars/rows, and exclude it from category averages.

links.source_location: identical getBrandStats filter by SONALIKA_ID + selectedCompetitors
duplicated intent-total formula over INTENT_BASE_COUNTS three signals
categoryAvgRate formula duplicated as categoryAvg (competitor publishRate mean excluding Sonalika)
